birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The small niltava (Niltava macgrigoriae) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae, native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fire-capped tit (Cephalopyrus flammiceps) is a small, long, weighing about bird species assigned to the family Paridae, that breeds in the temperate forest bordering the Himalayas to the south, in the Hengduan Shan and Nujiang Shan on the Myanmar-China border, the Micah Shan and Daba Shan on the Northern Sichuan border
